data.title: Update replan-observability.md to add sc_coverage trigger type and Consumers table emitter row
data.description:
## What
Edit `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-observability.md` to document the new sc_coverage REPLAN_TRIGGER type added by epic 615f-fad3.

## File Impact
- EDIT: `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-observability.md`

## Changes Required

### 1. Valid Types table — add sc_coverage row
Add sc_coverage to the Valid Types table in the REPLAN_TRIGGER section:
| `sc_coverage` | One or more epic success criteria could not be verified as covered by any child ticket. Emitted by the Preplanning Gate (Phase 1) before routing to /dso:preplanning (≥1 story-type child) or /dso:implementation-plan (all task-type children) to create or update coverage tasks. |

### 2. Consumers table — add emitter row
Add a new row to the Consumers table:
| `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` Phase 1 Preplanning Gate (sub-steps 2a1–2a3) | Emitter (sc_coverage) | Written before routing to preplanning/implementation-plan when haiku/sonnet/opus SC coverage cascade finds MISSING SCs |

### 3. Change Log — add additive change entry
Append to the Change Log:
`- **2026-04-11**: Additive — adds `sc_coverage` trigger type: emitted by the Phase 1 Preplanning Gate (sub-steps 2a1–2a3) when the haiku/sonnet/opus SC coverage cascade identifies one or more epic success criteria not covered by any child ticket.`

### 4. CLAUDE.md staleness scan
Confirm no CLAUDE.md sprint Phase 1 description becomes stale:
- Named-agent table: S1 creates prompt files only (no named agents) — no update needed
- Sprint self-healing loop description (line 87): describes 4 post-execution re-planning checkpoints — SC coverage gate is a pre-execution Preplanning Gate check, not a self-healing checkpoint — no update needed
- Document this no-op finding as a comment on ticket b09a-4204

## testing_mode
UPDATE — doc-only change; test infrastructure is explicitly OUT of scope for this story per done definitions. No behavioral test exists or is needed for doc content accuracy.

## Done Definition
- replan-observability.md Valid Types table includes sc_coverage row
- replan-observability.md Consumers table includes Phase 1 Preplanning Gate emitter row
- Change Log updated
- CLAUDE.md confirmed no staleness (comment recorded on b09a-4204)
